english_translated: She was slaughtered by her ex-husband.

turkish_raw: Genç kadın otel odasında bıçakla katledildi.
english_translated: The young woman was stabbed to death in her hotel room.

turkish_raw: Bir kadın daha eşi tarafından öldürüldü.
english_translated: Another woman was killed by her husband.

turkish_raw: Genç bir kadın daha eşi olacak cani tarafından öldürüldü.
english_translated: Yet another young woman has been killed by the monster who was to become her husband.
She was killed at the train station.
A woman was killed on Women's Day.
He strangled his wife with a rope.
They killed two women and buried them in the forest.
She was killed by her husband.

turkish_raw: Boşanma aşamasındaki eşini vurup polise teslim oldu.
english_translated: He shot his wife during their divorce proceedings and turned himself in to the police.

turkish_raw: 2 çocuk annesi kadın evinde bıçaklanarak öldürüldü.
english_translated: Two children's mother was stabbed to death in her house.
She was killed in front of her children.
Two women killed in the same house.
